{{ define "main" }}
{{ .Content }}
{{ $pages := where .Site.Params.nav.items "url" "ne" "/" }} {{ $currentURL := .RelPermalink }} {{ $prev := false }} {{ $next := false }} {{ $found := false }} {{ range $i, $item := $pages }} {{ if $found }} {{ if not $next }} {{ $next = $item }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ if eq $currentURL $item.url }} {{ $found = true }} {{ else if not $found }} {{ $prev = $item }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ with $prev }} {{ .title }} {{ end }}
{{ with $next }} {{ .title }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
